title: QUOKKA Magnetic Puzzles for 2 3 Year Olds - Travel Toys for Toddlers on Plane Car Ride - 20 Pcs Farm Toy Game with Extra-Long Play Book - Fun Travel Game for Kids - Gift for Boys and Girls Ages 3 4 5
features: FUN TODDLER MAGNETIC TOY: Delight your toddler with over 20 colorful animal magnets in a magnetic puzzle book; Arrange them on an extra-long play scene that unfolds across three sides; Endless storytelling and creative play for kids

GREAT TRAVEL GAMES FOR KIDS: Strong magnets keep pieces secure; compact lightweight book (17.5 x 17.5 cm) fits in any bag or backpack; It is ideal for home play & travel activities for kids; Must-have travel toys for kids ages 3-5 to enjoy everywhere

ENCOURAGES STORYTELLING SKILLS: Boosts your child's imagination and creativity in telling stories; Enhances hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills; A delightful and educational toddler magnetic toy kids love to play with either in groups or solo

ENGAGING EDUCATIONAL TOY: Though initially designed to enhance interaction for toddlers ages 1-3, it’s also perfect for kids ages 3-5; Animal characters help build various play scenarios, improving vocabulary, reasoning, and sentence-building skills

GREAT GIFT FOR KIDS PLAY: An exciting gift for birthdays, holidays, or any occasion as part of the QUOKKA magnetic puzzle collection for toddlers; kids love creating adventures with this fun magnetic set; a screen-free activity parents will appreciate
description: Product Description Spark your child’s imagination with 20+ bright fruit and vegetable magnets in a sturdy magnetic puzzle book. The strong magnets and extra-long fold-out scene keep pieces secure and fun ongoing, whether at home, in the car, or on a trip. A good travel-friendly toy that inspires endless creative play. This engaging magnetic set helps children build storytelling, vocabulary, and fine motor skills through hands-on, screen-free play. Kids love arranging the pieces and inventing exciting adventures on their own or with friends. A delightful educational gift for birthdays, holidays, and everyday.
